suggestedMessage:
Hey Haya! 👋

It's been a little while since we've seen you on flowOrder — just wanted to check in and make sure everything's going well.

Is there anything we can help with? Whether it's getting more orders, updating your menu, or anything else — we're here.

Hope things are good! 😊

context.note: Previously had 3 avg logins/week. Sharp drop-off 17 days ago. Unknown cause — no DM signals. Soft check-in only; don't push product features.
